title: Robin Chooses Life
description: Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this part follows Nico Robin, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Don't get cheeky with me now....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: disappeared from the map, didn't you....!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You could only be so cruel

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You can't use that. Not that.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Eh hee hee... there she is!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Don't go anywhere near my kids.

summary: Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.
